name: AWS IAM Assume Role Trust Policy Updated
description: Modification to the trust policy of an IAM role detected that changes which AWS principals or services are allowed to assume it. Such changes can be leveraged by adversaries to grant access to higher-privileged roles, potentially enabling lateral movement, privilege escalation, or long-term persistence. Careful monitoring of trust policy updates is essential to safeguard cross-account and service-based role assumptions.

rules.name: AWS IAM Assume Role Trust Policy Updated

author: Sunil Bharti, David Agni, Nikki Madayag
